_patch_meta.description: Full pre-analysis patch for registry 126 (purpose). Classifies all 200 NULL terms and corrects 11 existing misclassifications. NULL→extracted: 25, NULL→extracted_thin: 16, NULL→delete: 159. Reclassified extracted→delete: 9 (HFA bleed + non-purpose). Candidate_delete→delete: 2. Volume limitation flags: 2. HIGH priority data error flag raised (fourth consecutive registry with extraction anomaly).

operations.description: ATTENTION CLAUDE CODE — DB_ONLY_PROTECTED reclassification (FOURTH registry: 126 purpose). Same Phase 1 extraction anomaly as registries 98, 34, 160. HFA function words extracted this registry: G0846 (autos, 10000 occ), G1223 (dia, 1667), G3778 (houtos, 2919), H3588A (ki, 4499), H3820A (lev, 603). Also: non-purpose evaluative adverbs G1432, G2570G, G2573, G2761. All reclassified to delete with researcher authorisation. Additionally H3820A (heart) belongs to soul/heart registry, not purpose. Programme-wide audit of Phase 1 extraction source lists urgently required (PH2-34-005).

record.description: EXTRACTION ANOMALY — fourth consecutive registry. Five HFA terms incorrectly extracted: G0846 autos (10000 occ), G1223 dia (1667), G3778 houtos (2919), H3588A ki (4499), H3820A lev (603). Combined 20,089 occurrences. Overlap with purpose vocabulary: 0-3%. Additional non-purpose bleed: G1432 freely, G2570G good, G2573 well, G2761 vainly. See programme-level flag PH2-34-005.
